article_meta.title: Media Assistant AG puts Don Lemon 'on notice' over Minnesota church protest

reasoning: Two of three flagged items are verbatim quotes misattributed as author bias. Only the first item is a defensible author-prose bias. The model also missed at least one clear author-level inference about intent.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted language from Sen. Thune twice as author bias, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two of three items are not genuine author-level bias; they are attributed quotes. Only the first is defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed author-prose inference about intent: e.g., stating Thune would keep the bill on the floor "to highlight Democratic opposition" (mind reading/slant).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the one valid instance, 'Word Choice' fits. The other labels are moot due to attribution errors.
